listings.title: Prowlr Analyst
listings.description: Data analysis, market research, and competitive intelligence. Transforms raw data into actionable insights and structured reports. The signal in your noise.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr API Designer
listings.description: REST and GraphQL API design specialist. Generates OpenAPI specs, SDK scaffolding, and comprehensive documentation. Your API, designed right from the start.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Architect
listings.description: System architecture and design review agent. Analyzes codebases for structural integrity, suggests proven patterns, and reviews pull requests for architectural consistency. Your blueprint guardian.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Backend
listings.description: API design, database optimization, microservices architecture, and authentication systems. The engine behind every great app. Built to scale, hardened to last.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Data Engineer
listings.description: ETL pipelines, data modeling, SQL optimization, and warehouse design. Turns your data chaos into structured gold. Always watching your data flow.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Debugger
listings.description: Debugging specialist that hunts bugs with surgical precision. Systematic root cause analysis, log parsing, error tracing, and issue reproduction. The bug stops here.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr DevOps
listings.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker orchestration, Kubernetes deployments, and infrastructure automation. Ships your code while you sleep. Always deploying. Always reliable.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Frontend
listings.description: React, Next.js, and Vue specialist. Component architecture, responsive layouts, accessibility audits, and performance optimization. Pixel-perfect execution, every time.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr GameDev
listings.description: Game development specialist for Unity, Unreal, and web-based games. Game mechanics, physics, AI behavior trees, and shader programming. Level up your game development.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Guard
listings.description: Security monitoring agent that watches your infrastructure, scans for vulnerabilities, and alerts on threats. The silent sentinel of your stack.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Legal
listings.description: Privacy policies, terms of service, GDPR compliance, and legal document drafting. Protect your business with properly structured legal documents. Always compliant.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Mobile
listings.description: Cross-platform mobile development with React Native and Flutter. Native performance, shared codebase. Build once, deploy everywhere. Always in your pocket.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr PM
listings.description: Project management agent that keeps your team on track. Sprint planning, task decomposition, milestone tracking, and standup report generation. Ships on time, every time.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Sales
listings.description: Cold outreach, follow-up sequences, proposal generation, and lead research. CRM-ready automation that turns prospects into customers. Always closing.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Scout
listings.description: Research agent that hunts down information across the web, summarizes findings, and delivers structured reports. Tireless. Thorough. Never sleeps.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Security
listings.description: Security auditor and penetration testing guide. OWASP compliance checks, dependency scanning, secret detection, and vulnerability assessment. The lock on your digital door.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Support
listings.description: Customer support automation that never sleeps. Ticket triage, FAQ generation, troubleshooting guides, and escalation management. Always watching your support queue.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Tutor
listings.description: Adaptive learning assistant that meets you where you are. Explains concepts at your level, creates exercises, tracks progress, and adjusts difficulty. Patient, tireless, always ready to teach.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Writer
listings.description: Content creation powerhouse. Blog posts, documentation, SEO-optimized copy, and technical writing. Words that work as hard as you do. Never misses a deadline.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Client Follow-Up
listings.description: Never lose a deal or damage a relationship because you forgot to follow up. Tracks every client interaction and sends timely, personalized follow-ups so you stay top-of-mind without a full CRM.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Competitor Watch
listings.description: Monitors competitor websites, pricing pages, job listings, and social accounts for meaningful changes — then sends you a plain-English summary of what changed and why it matters.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Content Scheduler
listings.description: Plan, write, and schedule social media posts across Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, and more from one place. Suggests optimal posting times based on your audience engagement patterns.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Homework Helper
listings.description: A patient, always-available tutor that walks kids through homework step by step — building real understanding instead of just giving answers. Works from third-grade math to college chemistry.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Invoice Chaser
listings.description: Tracks every outstanding invoice, sends polite escalating follow-ups on your behalf, and gives you a weekly cash-flow summary so you stop losing money to forgotten receivables.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Meal Planner
listings.description: Get a full week of meals with a consolidated grocery list, personalized to your family's size, dietary needs, budget, and cooking skill. Reuses ingredients across meals to cut waste and cost.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Morning Briefing
listings.description: Wake up to a personalized daily summary covering your calendar, unread emails, local weather, and top news stories. Delivered to your preferred channel before you even pour your coffee.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Site Monitor
listings.description: Monitors your websites for downtime, slow response times, SSL certificate expiry, and content changes. Alerts you within seconds of an issue so you fix it before your users even notice.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Smart Reminder
listings.description: Tell it what you need to remember in plain language and it figures out exactly when and how to remind you. Adapts to your schedule, follows up if you don't act, and never lets important things slip th
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Study Planner
listings.description: Turn a pile of exams and deadlines into a realistic, day-by-day study schedule that uses spaced repetition and adapts when life gets in the way. No more 2 AM cram sessions.
listings.author: ProwlrBot Team

listings.title: Computer Use
listings.description: Give Claude control of a computer — click, type, browse, run commands. Adapted from the Anthropic computer-use-demo quickstart.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Customer Support Agent
listings.description: Multi-turn customer support agent with tool use, knowledge base lookup, and escalation logic. From Anthropic Cookbook.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: PDF Analysis
listings.description: Analyze PDFs directly with Claude's native PDF support — extract text, summarize, answer questions, and compare documents.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: RAG Pipeline
listings.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline with vector search. Chunk, embed, store, and query your documents with Claude.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Structured Outputs
listings.description: Force Claude to return valid JSON matching a schema using tool use or prefilling. Works for data extraction, classification, and form filling.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Tool Use Orchestration
listings.description: Patterns for multi-tool orchestration, parallel tool execution, and agentic loops with Claude's tool use API.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Cron Scheduler
listings.description: Schedule and manage recurring tasks with natural language — 'every Monday at 9am' becomes a cron expression, with APScheduler integration.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Data Visualizer
listings.description: Generate charts and dashboards from data using matplotlib, plotly, and pandas. Outputs PNG, HTML, or SVG visualizations.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Email Drafter
listings.description: Draft professional emails in any tone — cold outreach, follow-ups, escalations, announcements, and replies — with tone matching and subject line variants.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Log Analyzer
listings.description: Parse and analyze application logs — find errors, detect anomalies, build timelines, and summarize incidents from structured or unstructured log files.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Meeting Summarizer
listings.description: Transcribe audio recordings and generate structured meeting summaries with action items, decisions, and follow-up assignments.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Code Review Bot
listings.description: Automated code review that posts line-level GitHub PR comments with security findings, style issues, and improvement suggestions. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: GitHub Issue Triage
listings.description: Automatically triage incoming GitHub issues — classify by type, assign labels, route to teams, and draft responses. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Jira Sync
listings.description: Sync GitHub issues/PRs with Jira tickets, auto-create tickets from commits, and generate sprint summaries. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Slack Notifier
listings.description: Send rich Slack notifications with Block Kit — alerts, reports, approvals, and interactive messages. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Web Scraper
listings.description: Intelligent web scraper using Playwright + Claude to extract structured data from any website, handling dynamic content and pagination.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: ProwlrHub MCP Server
listings.description: Multi-agent coordination via MCP. Mission board, file locking, real-time events, shared context. The nervous system of your agent pack.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: ProwlrTools MCP Server
listings.description: Essential agent tools via MCP — file operations, shell execution, browser automation, and screenshot capture. The hands of your agents.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Business Analyst
listings.description: Prompt pack for business analysis — SWOT, competitive matrices, market sizing, and executive summaries. Think MBA without the debt.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Code Assistant
listings.description: Prompt pack for coding — refactoring, debugging, documentation, test generation, and architecture review. Your pair programmer that never takes breaks.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Code Migration
listings.description: Language and framework migration playbooks. Python 2 to 3, React class to hooks, monolith to microservices, and more. Migrate without breaking everything.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Content Calendar
listings.description: Social media content planning, scheduling templates, and engagement analysis prompts. Plan a month of content in minutes. Consistent posting, maximum reach.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Incident Responder
listings.description: Production incident response playbook prompts. Structured triage, communication templates, root cause analysis, and post-mortem frameworks. Stay calm under fire.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Interview Prep
listings.description: Technical interview preparation covering system design, algorithms, behavioral questions, and mock interviews. Practice with an AI that adapts to your target company and role.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Startup Advisor
listings.description: Business plan frameworks, pitch deck structures, market analysis templates, and funding strategy prompts. From idea to Series A, guided every step.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: API Tester
listings.description: API endpoint testing, load testing, and response validation. Generates test suites from OpenAPI specs, validates schemas, and catches regressions before they ship.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Code Review
listings.description: Automated code review with style checks, security scanning, and best practice suggestions. Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, and Rust.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Container Manager
listings.description: Docker Compose generation, Kubernetes manifest creation, and container health monitoring. Orchestrate your containers with precision. Always running, always healthy.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Database Migrator
listings.description: Schema migration planning, data transformation scripts, and rollback strategies. Migrate with confidence. Every change reversible, every step verified.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Doc Generator
listings.description: Auto-generate API documentation, README files, and architecture diagrams from your codebase. Never write docs from scratch again. Always up to date.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Git Workflow
listings.description: Branch management, PR creation, merge conflict resolution, and changelog generation. Streamlines your entire git workflow from branch to release.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: PDF Reader
listings.description: Extract text, tables, and images from PDF documents. Handles encrypted PDFs, OCR for scanned pages, and multi-language content.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Performance Profiler
listings.description: CPU and memory profiling, bottleneck detection, and optimization suggestions. Find what's slow, understand why, and fix it. Every millisecond counts.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Secret Scanner
listings.description: Detect leaked credentials, API keys, tokens, and secrets in code and git history. Scan before you ship. Because one leaked key can cost everything.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Test Runner
listings.description: Comprehensive test suite runner with coverage reports. Supports Python (pytest), JavaScript (jest/vitest), Rust (cargo test), and Go (go test). Run, analyze, report.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Web Monitor
listings.description: Watch any webpage for changes and get notified instantly. Tracks content diffs, sends alerts via webhook, Discord, or Telegram. Never miss an update again.
listings.author: prowlrbot

listings.title: Arctic Frost
listings.description: Cool blue-white minimalist theme. Clean lines, generous whitespace, and icy accents. Maximum readability, minimum distraction. Crystal clear focus.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Dark Prowler
listings.description: Sleek dark theme with cyan accents and subtle glow effects. For agents who hunt at night. Default dark theme for ProwlrBot console.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Light Sentinel
listings.description: Clean light theme with deep blue accents and crisp contrast. For agents who guard the daylight. Default light theme for ProwlrBot console.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Midnight Hacker
listings.description: Deep black background with neon green accents. Matrix-inspired terminal aesthetics for the developer who lives in the command line. Code in the dark.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Sunset Horizon
listings.description: Warm gradient theme with orange and purple tones. Easy on the eyes during long sessions, beautiful enough to show off. Where productivity meets aesthetics.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Content Publish Pipeline
listings.description: Full content lifecycle from draft to distribution. Write, review, SEO optimize, publish, and promote across social channels. Content that reaches its audience.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Daily Standup
listings.description: Automated daily status aggregation across all your agents. What got done, what's blocked, what's next — delivered to your channel every morning.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Deploy Review Pipeline
listings.description: Automated code review to deployment pipeline. Lint, test, review, approve, deploy — one trigger, zero babysitting. Ship faster, break less.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Incident Response Workflow
listings.description: End-to-end incident management. Detect, alert, diagnose, fix, and generate post-mortems. From first alert to resolution, fully orchestrated.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Repo Onboarding
listings.description: New repository setup workflow. Initialize project, configure dependencies, set up CI/CD, generate docs, and create your first PR. From zero to shipping in minutes.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: PR Review Pipeline
listings.description: Automated pull request review pipeline. Lint, test, security scan, code review, and approval in one seamless flow. Every PR reviewed thoroughly, every time.
listings.author: ProwlrBot
